data.name: CompositeResultElement_GetBoolean_JsonElementHasWrongType
data.value: The requested operation requires an element of type '{0}', but the target element has type '{1}'.

data.name: SourceResultElement_GetBoolean_JsonElementHasWrongType
data.value: The requested operation requires an element of type '{0}', but the target element has type '{1}'.

data.name: Rethrowable
data.value: HotChocolate.Text.Json.Rethrowable

data.name: JsonReaderHelper_TranscodeHelper_CannotTranscodeInvalidUtf8
data.value: Cannot transcode invalid UTF-8 JSON text to UTF-16 string.

data.name: ThrowHelper_ReadInvalidUTF16
data.value: Cannot read invalid UTF-16 JSON text as string. Invalid surrogate value: '{0}'.

data.name: ThrowHelper_ReadIncompleteUTF16
data.value: Cannot read incomplete UTF-16 JSON text as string with missing low surrogate.

data.name: FixedSizeArrayPool_Return_InvalidArraySize
data.value: Buffer size {0} does not match expected chunk size {1}

data.name: OperationPlannerGuardrailException_GuardrailExceeded
data.value: Planner guardrail exceeded for operation '{0}': {1} (Limit={2}, Observed={3}).

data.name: SourceSchemaRequestDispatcher_NodeNotRegisteredInGroup
data.value: The execution node with id '{0}' is registered to be part of batching group '{1}', but no request was submitted for that node.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_SubscriptionBatchNotSupported
data.value: Subscription requests are not supported by batch execution.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_InvalidRequestIndex
data.value: The batch response contains an invalid requestIndex '{0}'.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_NoResponseChannelForNode
data.value: No response channel exists for node '{0}'.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_InvalidVariableIndex
data.value: The batch response contains an invalid variableIndex '{0}' for node '{1}'.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_VariableIndexOutOfRange
data.value: The batch response contains an out-of-range variableIndex '{0}'.

data.name: HttpSourceSchemaClient_NoResultForNode
data.value: The batch response does not contain any result for node '{0}'.

data.name: SourceSchemaRequestDispatcher_DuplicateNodeSubmission
data.value: Node '{0}' was already submitted to its batching group.

data.name: SourceSchemaRequestDispatcher_RegisterGroupEmptyNodeIds
data.value: At least one node ID must be provided.

data.name: SourceSchemaRequestDispatcher_OperationAborted
data.value: The operation execution was aborted.

data.name: OperationPlan_NodeNotFound
data.value: No execution node with id '{0}' exists in this plan.

data.name: OperationPlan_IncrementalPlanParentNotFound
data.value: Could not resolve parent execution node for incremental plan at path '{0}'.

data.name: OperationBatchExecutionNode_MissingBatchResult
data.value: The batch response does not contain any result for operation '{0}'.

data.name: ExecutionNode_MissingBooleanVariable
data.value: Expected to have a boolean value for variable '${0}'.

data.name: JsonOperationPlanParser_SingleOperationRequired
data.value: There must be exactly one operation definition in the operation document of the operation plan.
